chooseLanguage.description: Title of the list of languages for the user to select from.

newsletterText.message: Learn about upcoming events and updates.
newsletterText.description: Text that accompanies the “Subscribe to our newsletter” link.

newsletterLink.description: Text of a link to subscribe to PREreview’s newsletter.

slackText.description: Text that accompanies the “Join our Slack Community” link.

slackLink.description: Text of a link to join PREreview’s Slack Community.

feedbackLink.description: Link that takes you to a form where you can share feedback about PREreview.org (what worked well on the site, what didn’t, etc.).

menuHeading.description: Heading for a list of links about PREreview, such as its Code of Conduct and Privacy Policy.

menuDonate.description: Text of the link to the page where you can donate to PREreview.

menuPeople.description: Text of the link to the page that lists the PREreview team.

menuFunding.description: Text of the link to the page that describes how PREreview is funded.

menuCodeOfConduct.description: Text of the link to the page for PREreview’s Code of Conduct.

menuEdiaStatement.description: Text of the link to the page for PREreview’s Equity, Diversity, Inclusion, and Accessibility Statement.

menuPrivacyPolicy.description: Text of the link to the page for PREreview’s Privacy Policy.

menuBlog.description: Text of the link to PREreview’s Blog.

menuPartners.description: Text of the link to the page that lists PREreview’s partners.

contactHeading.description: Heading for a list of ways to contact PREreview.

contactEmail.description: Text of the link to email PREreview.

contactBluesky.description: Text of the link to PREreview’s Bluesky profile.

contactMastodon.description: Text of the link to PREreview’s Mastodon profile.

contactYouTube.description: Text of the link to PREreview’s YouTube channel.

contactLinkedIn.description: Text of the link to PREreview’s LinkedIn profile.

contactGitHub.description: Text of the link to PREreview’s GitHub profile.

zenodo.message: PREreviews are available in our <community>Zenodo Community</community> and the <api>Zenodo API</api>.
zenodo.description: Text that describes where PREreviews are available on Zenodo.

copyright.message: All content is available under a Creative Commons <link>Attribution 4.0 International license</link>, except where otherwise stated.
copyright.description: Text that describes the copyright license for content on PREreview.org.
